name: transcriptomics
description: Transcriptomics analysis templates for differential expression, PCA, and functional enrichment.

interface.shortDescription: Differential expression, PCA, and enrichment analysis
interface.longDescription: Bundles transcriptomics analysis templates as independently searchable and executable atomic units. Includes R/Bioconductor-backed differential expression, PCA, and functional enrichment workflows; future Python scripts can live in the same plugin when they expose separate template manifests.
defaultPrompt: Use Transcriptomics to choose and run a differential expression, PCA, or enrichment template.
